missions.name: Forward Base Supply
missions.description: Marines need bulk asteroid ore for temporary forward bases. Any rock will do — just fill the hold.

missions.name: Armor Plating Contract
missions.description: Raw olivine for a new armor lamination run. Marines want it clean — no cross-contamination from other ores.

missions.name: Classified Procurement
missions.description: Marines need iron-nickel alloy for projects they won't explain. Small quantity, generous payout.
